problem id: 0f7be6a8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(1)

examples:
  10011011 -> 01001101
  10100111 -> 01010011
  00011101 -> 00001110
  00111101 -> 00011110
  00111010 -> 00011101
  11011011 -> 01101101
  01011100 -> 00101110
  00001110 -> 00000111

query: 10000001
predicted answer: 01000000
